sentence: You know, that's not that long. They said it could take up to 2 weeks to find a current. I mean, Michael knew what he was doing. I doubt anything would have...
어머 어떡해. 어떡해... 어디갔지? 어디갔지? 어딨어?
얘야. 너 그 옷 입고 나갈거야?
왜? 나 그 신발 마음에 드는데!
괜찮지만, 넌 오늘 이것을 신어라. 남자 키가 너보다 작을 수가 있잖아.
대학 때 남자를 만났으면 지금 중매쟁이도 필요 없잖아!
4년 대학 졸업하고, 넌 지금 은메달이야! 그러니까 동메달이 되기 전에 남자를 찾아야지.
때가 되면, 내 남편감은 내가 찾을게요.
니 아빠가 그 때가 지금이라고 말하셨어.
정말이야, 임마! 너 올해가 애정의 운세네.
야 우리 할머니도 할아버지를 그렇게 만났어. 그리고 말이야 이 책은 한번도 틀린 적이 없거든.
어떤 여잔데? 아니, 어떻게 생겼는지 알아야 만나면 알아보지.
야, 내 주제에 결혼은 무슨! 내 입에 풀칠하기도 바쁜데.
야, 요즘 능력있는 여자가 얼마나 많은데 그러냐?
남자가 자존심이 있지... 임마, 인생의 목표가 있어야지! 남보다 열심히 일해서 승진도 빨리 하고 성공해야지. 남들이 어부의 자식놈이라고 업신여기지 못하게...
나에겐 인생의 중대사야 임마. 자, 어때? 멋있지?
무슨 소리야? 내일 백화점에 어떻게 반환하라고? 이 넥타이 얼마나 비싼건데!
진수야. 운명의 여자가 나타나면 뭐라고 전해줄까?
Hey man, it's okay. Sun -- you'll be with her again. Soon, okay. Hey, I think they're trying to figure out what to do with us.
I think they're going to eat us.
All right, all of you -- get up. We're moving out.
You're going to help us get food and water.
What -- we work for you now?
You're going to do it because we have a long walk ahead of us.
Back to where you came from.
Hey Mike, I think we ought to stage a prison break here.
Yeah, well I want to figure out what the hell's going on over here before I make any decisions about anything.
Okay people, listen up. We need to gather as much food and water as we can. You travel in pairs. You move as fast as you can. Don't make any noise.
Maybe you could just take a minute to explain us what the hell is going on over here that's got you all so on edge.
You know what? That's a great idea, maybe we can swap stories on the road.
I'm going to go scout before we move.
I think she needs to be slapped.
Cindy, go with him. Libby, see what fruit you can gather. Take him with you.
I'll be okay, man. Don't worry.
Bernard and I will gather the fish.
The man knows how to fish. I'd take him with you if I were you.
Fine, he comes with us, too.
When was the last time you saw it?
I'm so used to it. I don't, I don't know.

I lost my wedding ring once. It's crazy where you look when you want to find something bad enough. I went through the garbage outside the house -- emptied the bags and everything. I even took apart the pipes in my bathroom because I was convinced that it had gone down the drain in the sink.
I went to a jeweler and I had a replica made, that's how. Yeah, now it's just rattling around in my sock drawer back home. Um, I can help you look.
No, thanks. I'm sure it will turn up.
Hey, hey, you want to help us out over here?
You want to eat? Help us.
고기 잡는 꼴 하고는... 저러다가 굶어 죽지!
Does it look like I speak Korean?!
네 맞습니다. 제가 운이 좋았던 것 같습니다.
생김새로나 말투로 봐서 도시 태생은 아닌 것 같고... 자네 고향이 어디야?
(Picking up the phone) 오늘부터 권진수 씨 직원으로 발령하세요. 지금부터 바로 일 시작하고, 비가 오나 눈이 오나 열심히 일하되 봉급 인상이나 휴가는 없어.
미스터 권! 서울 게이트웨이 호텔은 최상의 서비스를 자랑하는 한국 최고의 호텔이야. 자네 같은 사람들은 절대로 드나들 수 없는 곳이야.
You know, about throwing you and your friends into the pit.
I guess I just never thought about it like that. I mean, I guess one of them is my friend.
I don't think I've ever seen someone so scared in my life. And I know about scared.
That why you threw us in the pit -- because you're scared?
Huh, how about that? Where the hell are all the fruit?
We picked these trees pretty clean. Sometimes you can find them on the ground.
Why don't you head inland? That's where all the fruit is on our side.
Because that's where They come from.
For your protection when we travel.
Did you make this? So what's your name, anyway?
So what's that, like Mr. Ed?
He just said something and he went into the jungle. He's gone.
What do you mean, we're leaving?
Your buddy ran off into the jungle.
마이클이 아들을 잃어버려서 찾으러 가는거야. 그래서 저래.
What's he trying to say? What's he saying?
Let's go. We're moving out now. Cindy, water. Libby, can you carry the radio?
Wait, you have a radio? Does it work? Can you use it?
Wow, what a great idea! You going to slow us down?
We're leaving before he can tell Them where we are.

What are we supposed to do, wait for him? He ain't coming back without his kid. Walt - he ain't coming back without Walt. You really think he's going to find him? In case you haven't noticed it's every man for himself, Chewie. Mike's got to worry about Mike. And I've got to worry about me.
You're going the wrong way. That's where he's going. Toward Them.
I'm going to help him find his friend.
All you've got to do is retrace your steps. Like, what'd you do yesterday?
I woke up, washed up, walked with Shannon, picked some fruit, cut it up to feed Vincent. And then I was...
Whoa, you fed the dog? Bingo!
So, Seoul. Is that in the good Korea or the bad Korea?
Did you go to the Olympics?
Hurley, this is ridiculous. Waiting here for... the dog did not eat my ring.

Dude, dogs will eat anything. When I was a kid, my dog, Buster -- I had this drawer where I'd throw in all my change, right -- and I guess there were some Smarties in there -- so, like, the next day, Buster craps out a buck thirty-five in nickels. Did you ever own a dog?
Yes. Jin gave me one, a puppy.
얘야, 선아, 말할 때 손짓하지 말아. 알았어? 그리고, 질문 받기 전에는 절대로 말하면 안된다.
안녕하세요? 예쁘게 생겼네. 마음에 쏙 들거야. 잘 생겼지, 학벌 좋지, 아버님이 이 호텔 회장님이셔. 거기다가 호텔을 열두개나 가지고 있대.
어서오십시오, 서울 게이트웨이 호텔을 찾아주셔서 감사합니다!
무슨 과찬의 말씀을... 제가 알기로는 댁의 따님이 서울대학 다녔다면서요?
자, 이제 그만 둘이서 얘기할 수 있도록 시간을 좀 내줍시다.
어느 분이 더 걱정하세요? 어머님, 아니면 아버님?
저희 아버님이요. 물론 어머님을 통해서. 그 쪽은요?
저도 저희 아버님이죠. 물론 어머님을 통해서... 이모하고 할머니까지 동원하셨어요. 무슨 전공 하셨어요?
오... 그래요? 솔직히 말씀드리면 전 미술은 잘 몰라요.
중세 러시아 문학이요. 어쩌다보니 지금은 호텔 일을 하고 있네요.
실은 항상 맞선 별로였거든요. 근데 오늘은 좀 다른데요?
No, for your cut. So, you're married? Your ring. You have a wife?
Worse. Your wife, what is her name? Her name?
She was with you? On the plane?
Rip apart your garden? No. Sometimes I wish I had a garden to tear apart.
I don't think I have ever seen you angry.
Oh, I used to get angry all the time. Frustrated too.
Same way anything lost gets found -- I stopped looking.
그 꽃 좀 빌려주시겠어요? 데이트가 있어서...
갑자기 카드가 안 되는 거에요, 그러니까 제가 타월만 걸치고 변태처럼 복도에 서있게 됐었죠...
그리고 호텔 메이드에게 상황을 설명하는데, 글쎄 제가 사장이라니까 절대로 안 믿는 거에요! 얼마나 황당하던지...
선 씨도 참 좋은 분이신 것 같아요. 그래서 말인데, 앞으로 우리 계속 만나는 걸로 하면 어떨까요? 그러면 부모님들도 안심하시고 우릴 놔두시지 않겠어요? 맞선 볼 걱정도 없고, 부모님 눈치 볼 일도 없고... 한마디로 자유로워지는거죠. 그리고 한마디 더 말씀드려도 될까요? 비밀인데...
하버드에서 백인 여자친구를 만났어요. 아직 아버지한테 말씀 못 드렸지만, 6개월 후에 미국에 돌아가서 그녀와 결혼할 겁니다. 잠깐, 제가 -
안녕하십니까 사장님. 뭐 더 좀 필요하신 거 없으십니까?
아니에요. 제가 중요한 약속이 있어서요, 그만...
No, not that way. Over here.
A round heel. This is fresh. These tracks...
Yes, Michael. They don't leave tracks.
No, they don't have him. They came from that way Your friend went that way , crossed ahead of them... very lucky.
잠시만요 잠시만, 저 실례지만 제 아들놈이 급해서 그러는데... 화장실 좀 써도 될까요? 부탁합니다, 급해서 그러는데...
죄송하지만 호텔 손님만 사용할 수 있습니다. 저 아래로 가시면 화장실이 있습니다. 참을 수 있겠지?
알았어요. 들어가서 왼쪽에 있으니까 빨리 쓰고 나오세요.
예예예, 대단히 감사합니다. 대단히 감사합니다. 감사합니다, 감사합니다.
미스터 권, 누가 들여보내래? 내가 자네에게 그렇게 시켰나?
길에서 싸든 무슨 상관이야! 너 같은 놈들 다 그런 거 아냐? 여기서 계속 일하고 싶으면 지금 당장 들어가서 그 놈들을 쫓아 보내!
It's pretty. Hurley told me that you lost your wedding ring.
I was just sitting here telling myself it's silly to be so upset about it -- it is just a thing.
Well, they've only been gone a few days, and...
Don't. I'm sick of everyone saying he's alright. He's not alright. Claire found the bottle -- the one with the messages inside -- the one from the raft.
Stop. Let me see your water. You keep slowing us down, we're going to leave you behind.
Now that your tracker's gone how are you going to find our camp without me?
Walk across the Island, follow the beaches. And Eko's coming back.
Too bad, you seem suited for it.
Funny. Let's go. What are we waiting for?
Wait here, we lost his trail. I'll go back and find it.
What are you doing? Go back.
Go away! I'm not going back without him. Walt! I'm here! Where are you, man?! Walt!! What, you worried they're going to hear me? Let them take me! Come! Come take me!
Shouting is not a good idea. You need to come back with us now.
I'm not leaving him out here! Stay away from me.
I know they took your son. But you have no idea what these people are capable of -- and they will not be found if they don't want to be.
They took him right out of my hands -- right out of my hands! I'm not going back without him.
Kate! Those are private. Kate, stop. What are you doing?!
We didn't, uh... I didn't say goodbye.
